message:
Add matrix inverse kernel and SingularMatrix error variant

New inv_tensor_contiguous_f64() function implementing matrix inverse
via LU factorization with partial pivoting, solving against the
identity matrix. Adds SingularMatrix error variant to KernelError
for matrices where LU decomposition detects a zero pivot.

- crates/ft-kernel-cpu/src/lib.rs: +119 lines — SingularMatrix error
  variant with Display impl, inv_tensor_contiguous_f64() using LU
  decomposition with partial pivoting, singularity detection, and
  back-substitution against identity columns

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
